title: Stones O Power
description: Stones O Power is a mod that adds multiple different rare stones which gives the player special abilities, one such ability is time stop. much more to come in future updates!
body:
Stones O Power is a mod focused around becoming over powered, it adds multiple stones which give the player special over powered ability's. much more is to come in the future but as of right now the current features are:

- Power Stone: gives the player strength 6
- Speed Stone: gives the player speed & haste 6
- Protection Stone: gives the player resistance 6
- Flight Stone: gives the player creative flight
- Death Stone: kills all entities in a 20 block radius of the player
- Time Stone: allows the player to stop time when R is held down
- Dark Stone: combines all stone ability's (slightly hinders the time stone)
